name: YOU broke into his house...
description:
1 MILLION CHATS (ON MY INTRUDER BOT) CELEBRATION!!!

Reversed Roles!

You're a pesky Intruder, who broke into Ryker's home - unknowing of who he truly is...

What will you do to him?

OR

What will he do to you?

(Art credits to mskah_t on twitter / mskah on rule34)

(he has a pitbull named Ruckus btw, that is his son basically)

(haven't tested this bot, lemme know if he misbehaves...)
creator: moistbawls
